input: My order B2048 arrived damaged. Can I get a refund?
final_response: I've issued a refund of $35.00 for order B2048. It should appear on your statement within a few business days. (see refunds.md: Refund window)

policy_citations.snippet: Refunds are available within 30 days of delivery. Orders outside the 30-day window are not eligible for a monetary refund, but the customer may be offered an alternative such as store credit or a discount on a future order.
